title: Savory Gooey Croatian Cheese Flatbread
description: A tangy and gooey Croatian dish featuring naan bread, perfect for a sick day, with a Mediterranean twist.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together the crumbled feta cheese and kajmak cheese until well combined.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the sour cream, minced garlic, salt, and black pepper until smooth.
Brush the naan bread pieces with olive oil on both sides.
Place the naan bread on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Spread a quarter of the sour cream mixture on each naan bread piece, leaving a small border around the edges.
Top each naan bread piece with a quarter of the cheese mixture.
Bake the flatbreads in the preheated oven for 12 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the flatbreads from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
